# Oracle Capsule adversarial fixtures

- `duplicate-key.json`: ambiguous object identity and downgrade attempt.
- `lone-surrogate.json`: non-I-JSON Unicode scalar data.
- `unsafe-integer.json`: non-interoperable integer input.
- `traversal-source-lock.json`: extraction outside the locked root.

The executable corpus in `capsule.test.ts` also mutates the valid release to cover digest/CID disagreement, missing and unlocked files, cyclic/self dependencies, unknown tools, extra Master skills, writable content, release-digest tamper and attempted live-authority claims. Resolver-specific redirect, DNS/IP and archive-reader controls belong to the runtime issues and are not claimed by this in-memory static verifier.
